Student.title: Student Progress and Profile
Student.description: Information about registered students, their learning progress, stats, and last active time.

uid.description: The unique user ID from Firebase Auth.

name.description: The display name of the student.

email.description: The email address of the student.

level.description: English proficiency level: Beginner, Intermediate, or Advanced.

savedWords.description: List of saved vocabulary words or IDs.

lastActive.description: ISO timestamp of the last active time.

points.description: Points earned from completing lessons and quizzes.

Teacher.title: Teacher Profile
Teacher.description: Information about professors, registered via the code verify step.

uid.description: The unique user ID from Firebase Auth or local custom login.

name.description: The display name of the professor.

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp when the teacher was added.

Lesson.title: Lesson Content
Lesson.description: English pathway lesson with title, description, markdown body, level, and quizzes.

category.description: grammar, vocabulary, reading, writing, listening, speaking, or pronunciation

quiz.description: List of questions for the lesson

Vocabulary.title: Vocabulary Word
Vocabulary.description: Word or expression with translation, explanation, category, and example.

LiveSession.title: Live Virtual Class
LiveSession.description: Scheduled live video classes or streaming links managed by teachers.

ChatMessage.title: Chat Message
ChatMessage.description: Messages sent between students and teachers/AI assistants.

TrainingTopic.title: Training Topic
TrainingTopic.description: Topics used in the Question Wheel educational game.

TrainingQuestion.title: Training Question
TrainingQuestion.description: Questions linked to training topics in the Question Wheel.

TypingSentence.title: Typing Sentence
TypingSentence.description: Sentences for the Typing Speed Trainer game.

RecordedLesson.title: Recorded Lesson
RecordedLesson.description: Recorded academic video sessions uploaded by teachers.

/students/{studentId}.description: Student progress records synced via uid.

/lessons/{lessonId}.description: Course lessons across levels and categories.

/liveSessions/{sessionId}.description: Virtual meeting links for live pathway sessions.

/chats/{chatId}/messages/{messageId}.description: Live student chat messages with AI/teachers.

/training_topics/{topicId}.description: Topics for the educational Question Wheel game.

/training_questions/{questionId}.description: Questions matching the Question Wheel topics.

/typing_sentences/{sentenceId}.description: Sentences for typing practice across levels.

/recorded_lessons/{lessonId}.description: Recorded videos managed by teachers and watched by students.
